Current Operations

    Other Operations

    Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • Three Things To Watch As The US-Iran Cease-Fire Takes Hold RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- The United States and Iran have agreed to a two-week cease-fire, brokered by Pakistan, premised on Iran reopening the Strait of Hormuz.
  • US-Iran Cease-Fire Falters Amid Accusations Of Violations RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- The temporary truce between the United States and Iran wobbled less than a day after being agreed as Israel launched massive attacks on Iranian proxies in Lebanon, while Tehran launched strikes at oil centers in several Persian Gulf countries after claiming its energy facilities were targeted.

  • US, Iran Reach Last-Minute Agreement On Two-Week Cease-Fire RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- US President Donald Trump and Iran have agreed to a two-week Pakistani-brokered cease-fire, pulling back from the brink to allow the two sides time to negotiate a peace deal.
  • Trump says he agrees to suspend bombing and attack of Iran for 2 weeks Global Times 08 Apr 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump said Tuesday he has agreed to "suspend the bombing and attack of Iran for a period of two weeks."
  • US, Iran agree on two-week ceasefire deal with planned talks in Islamabad in dramatic reverse; Israeli PM says he supports temporary truce if Iran opens straits Global Times 08 Apr 2026 -- In a stunning turn of events closely watched by the world, the US-Israeli operation against Iran that had dragged on for over a month has dramatically reversed, ushering in a significant de-escalation of tensions. Hours after US President Donald Trump threatened "a whole civilization will die," the US leader announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran on Tuesday night. Iranian side later confirmed the two-week ceasefire deal negotiated by Pakistan, saying it does not mean an end to the war with release of Tehran's 10-point peace plan.

  • Iran's Lavan oil refinery attacked hours after US announcement of ceasefire Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- The National Iranian Oil Refining and Distribution Company says an oil refinery located on Iran's Lavan Island came under attack on Wednesday morning, despite the announcement of a ceasefire between the United States and Iran.

  • Transcript: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs Air Force Gen. Dan Caine Hold a Press Briefing DoD 08 Apr 2026 -- SECRETARY OF WAR PETE HEGSETH: Iran has been a threat to the United States and the free world for 47 years, chants of death to America, targeting our people, killing Americans, lying and blackmailing their way toward a nuclear weapon, so they thought. No longer. Not on our watch.
  • Epic Fury Quelled for Now, Objectives Accomplished, U.S. Forces Remain Ready DoD News 08 Apr 2026 -- In fewer than 40 days, unrelenting military action by America's joint force has helped accomplish all the goals President Donald J. Trump set for Operation Epic Fury.
  • Leaders Praise Troops Who Rescued Downed Airmen in Iran DoD News 08 Apr 2026 -- Enemy forces in Iran downed two airmen in an F-15E Strike Eagle fighter jet, flying in support of Operation Epic Fury, April 3; both service members were successfully rescued in just under 48 hours from when the mission to save them began.
  • Peace Through Strength: Operation Epic Fury Crushes Iranian Threat as Ceasefire Takes Hold The White House 08 Apr 2026
  • U.S. says military goals against Iran largely achieved, sets talks deadline Global Times 08 Apr 2026 -- U.S. Vice President JD Vance said on Tuesday that the United States has largely achieved its military objectives against Iran, while warning that Tehran faces a narrowing window to enter negotiations or risk further economic hardship.

  • Kuwait, UAE Report Missile And Drone Attacks RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- Hours after the United States announced a temporary cease-fire with Iran, Kuwait and the United Arab Emirates (UAE) said they were fending off Iranian missile and drone attacks.
  • Bahrain Reports Iranian Strike Hours After US-Iran Cease-Fire Announced RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- Bahrain has reported an Iranian strike just hours after Tehran and Washington agreed to a temporary halt in hostilities, which included Iran refraining from attacking countries in the region.
  • US-Israeli aggression on Iran: What happened on 40th day of the imposed war Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Forty days into the US-Israeli war on Iran, Tehran forced Washington to accept its terms and agree to a ceasefire, marking a historic victory for the Islamic Republic as the US pivoted to diplomacy after failing to achieve any of its war objectives.
  • IRGC pounded 25+ US-Israeli targets in 100th wave of Operation True Promise 4 Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) pounded more than 25 strategic targets belonging to the United States and Israel in the 100th wave of the decisive Operation True Promise 4.
  • Heavy Israeli Strikes On Lebanon Add Uncertainty Hours After US-Iran Cease-Fire Deal RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- Lebanese officials say dozens of people have been killed in the heaviest Israeli strikes on the country since the war in Iran broke out five weeks ago.

  • Vance Says Iran Misunderstood Truce Deal, Israel Has Offered To Show Restraint In Lebanon RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- US Vice President JD Vance said he suspects Iran misunderstood the terms of the cease-fire deal reached with Pakistan's mediation, believing that the truce included Lebanon when it did not.
  • Trump Says He Believes China Pushed Iran To Cease-Fire Deal RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said he thinks China was involved in getting Iran to negotiate a two-week cease-fire that was announced late on April 7.
  • Trump aides called Netanyahu's regime change plan in Iran 'farcical': Report Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Top US officials told President Donald Trump that Israeli prime minister Benjamin Netanyahu's "regime change" plan in Iran was "farcical", the New York Times reports.
  • Trump signals cooperation with Iran after 'regime change' Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- US President Donald Trump on Wednesday said that the US will engage with Iran following what he described as a "very productive Regime Change," signaling a dramatic shift toward cooperation even as major disputes endure, according to Anadolu Agency.
  • Trump promises Golden Age for Middle East Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran is ready to pursue peace and signaled that the United States could assist with stabilizing shipping traffic in the Strait of Hormuz, according to a post on his Truth Social platform.
  • Trump announces 2-week ceasefire with Iran Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- US President Donald Trump announced Tuesday a two-week suspension of military action against Iran following discussions with Pakistani leaders.

  • Statement by PM Netanyahu Israel - Prime Minister 08 Apr 2026 -- "As you know, a two-week temporary ceasefire between the United States and Iran went into effect tonight, in full coordination with Israel. No, they did not surprise us at the last minute. Now, I want to emphasize, this is not the end of the campaign. This is a way station on the way to achieving all of our goals."
  • FM Sa'ar speaks with German FM Johann Wadephul Israel MFA 08 Apr 2026 -- The United States and Israel have demonstrated an unwavering commitment to achieving the goal that matters to the entire international community: preventing the Iranian terror regime from obtaining nuclear weapons.
  • Israeli leaders: 'Not a single goal' achieved in war with Iran Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Israeli opposition leader Yair Lapid has sharply criticized prime minister Benjamin Netanyahu for supporting a temporary ceasefire between the United States and Iran, calling it a "political disaster."
  • Israel backs Trump's 2-week pause on Iran strikes Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- The office of Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Wednesday that Israel supports US President Donald Trump's decision to suspend military strikes against Iran for two weeks.

  • Iran President Says Truce Reached With US Takes Into Account Principles Outlined by Tehran Sputnik 08 Apr 2026 -- The truce reached with United States takes into account principles outlined by Tehran, Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said on Wednesday.
  • Iran Declares 'Historic Victory' as Trump Accepts 10-Point Plan — Reports Sputnik 08 Apr 2026 -- Iran has declared it achieved a decisive outcome in the recent confrontation, stating the US has accepted a 10-point plan proposed by Tehran, according to the Supreme National Security Council of Iran, cited by Tasnim News Agency.
  • President Pezeshkian calls ceasefire in Lebanon key condition in Iran's 10-point ceasefire proposal Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian has said ceasefire in Lebanon remains one of the central conditions of Iran's 10-point ceasefire proposal aimed at cessation of unprovoked aggression targeting the region.
  • Speaker Qalibaf says ceasefire, negotiations with US 'unreasonable', citing truce violations Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Iran's parliament speaker has said that a bilateral ceasefire or negotiations with the United States would be "unreasonable" given the serious violations committed by aggressors, even before any talks have begun.
  • Pezeshkian: Iran will respond decisively to any ceasefire violation Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian has condemned the violations of the ceasefire reached between Iran and the United States, vowing that the Islamic Republic will respond "decisively" to any attack.
  • 'Hands on trigger': IRGC vows powerful response to any ceasefire violation Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has warned that any violation of the two-week ceasefire by the aggressors will trigger an immediate response with full power.
  • Iran's FM discusses Israel's ceasefire violations with Pakistan's army chief Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has discussed Israel's "violations of the ceasefire in Iran and Lebanon" with the Pakistani army's chief.
  • Iran may rise in 'full-scale defense' any moment as Israel violates truce agreement: Official Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Iran could rise up in full-scale defense at any moment as the Israeli regime is resorting to violation of a fragile and temporary ceasefire, a senior security official has warned.
  • President Pezeshkian: Iranians will continue to stand together after ceasefire Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian has reaffirmed Iran's unity following the ceasefire agreement with the US, emphasizing that it is a direct result of the sacrifices made by martyred Leader Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, and the unwavering participation of the Iranian people.
  • Iran VP: Victory in 40-day war fruit of 'Khamenei school of thought' Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref has stated that Iran's victory in the 40-day war against the "front of evil" is the fruit of the formation of the "Khamenei school of thought."
  • 'Hiding aggressors': Iran rebukes Bahrain's failed Security Council motion Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Iran's deputy foreign minister for legal and international affairs has stated that the security of the Strait of Hormuz cannot be secured by concealing the identity of the aggressors, stressing that it requires an end to aggression, punishment of the aggressors, accountability, and the rule of law.
  • Bushehr nuclear plant safely producing electricity despite attacks: Iran Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- The Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant is safely continuing its electricity production despite several missile strikes by the US and Israel near the facility over the past weeks.
  • Iran confirms talks with US to begin in Pakistan's capital on Friday amid pause in hostilities Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- Iran's Supreme National Security Council announced in the early hours of Wednesday that negotiations with US representatives will begin in Islamabad on Friday and will be concluded, lasting up to 15 days under Pakistan's mediation, confirming a limited pause in hostilities between the two sides.
  • Iran, U.S. agree to 2-week ceasefire, negotiations to be held in Pakistan People's Daily 08 Apr 2026 -- Iran and the United States have agreed to a 2-week ceasefire less than two hours before the deadline set by U.S. President Donald Trump, and will hold negotiations in Pakistan.
  • FM Araghchi says Iran will cease defensive strikes if unprovoked attacks are halted Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has announced on behalf of Iran's top security body that the Islamic Republic would halt its defensive strikes if unprovoked attacks targeting the country were halted.

  • Iran ceasefire raises hopes for reopening key Strait of Hormuz UN News 08 Apr 2026 -- The announcement of a shaky two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran, will it is hoped, lead to the opening of the strategically important Strait of Hormuz, a vital waterway through which one fifth of the world's oil and gas passes.
  • UN Security Council fails to adopt draft resolution on Strait of Hormuz Global Times 08 Apr 2026 -- The UN Security Council on Tuesday failed to adopt a draft resolution that "strongly encourages" states interested in the use of commercial maritime routes in the Strait of Hormuz to coordinate efforts of a defensive nature to contribute to ensuring the safety and security of navigation across the Strait of Hormuz, including through the escort of merchant and commercial vessels.

  • China welcomes US-Iran ceasefire, says it also made 'efforts' to halt fighting Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- China on Wednesday welcomed the US-Iran ceasefire, saying that Beijing also made "efforts" to halt the fighting, according to Anadolu Agency.
  • 'Our vote will stand the test of history': Chinese envoy after vetoing UN Security Council draft resolution on the Strait of Hormuz Global Times 08 Apr 2026 -- The UN Security Council on Tuesday local time failed to adopt a draft resolution that "strongly encourages" states interested in the use of commercial maritime routes in the Strait of Hormuz to coordinate efforts of a defensive nature to contribute to ensuring the safety and security of navigation across the Strait of Hormuz, including through the escort of merchant and commercial vessels, according to the Xinhua News Agency.
  • UN Security Council's actions must not grant license to use of force: Chinese envoy Global Times 08 Apr 2026 -- The UN Security Council's actions must not grant a license to the use of force, let alone further exacerbate tensions and add fuel to the fire, said Fu Cong, China's permanent representative to the United Nations, on Tuesday.

  • Foreign Ministry statement on the outcome of the UN Security Council meeting on the situation in the Persian Gulf Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 08 Apr 2026
  • Kremlin welcomes US-Iran ceasefire, hopes direct contacts will take place 'in coming days' Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- The Kremlin on Wednesday welcomed the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran, Anadolu Agency reports.
  • Strait of Hormuz is Iran's 'nuclear weapon' that forced US retreat: Russia's Medvedev Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Russia's former president, Dmitry Medvedev, says Iran's undisputed command over the Strait of Hormuz has become its true "tested nuclear weapon" that forced the United States to retreat.

  • Pakistani premier announces immediate ceasefire between US, Iran; plans Islamabad talks Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has announced that the US and Iran, along with their allies, have agreed to an immediate ceasefire across all conflict zones, including Lebanon, Anadolu Agency reported.

Élysée - President of France 08 Apr 2026
  • European Leaders Welcome Cease-Fire Announcement RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- European leaders have expressed support for the two-week cease-fire announced by Washington and Tehran on April 8, although they emphasized the continuing need for de-escalation and diplomacy.
  • Middle East ceasefire Prime Minister of Australia 08 Apr 2026
  • Erdogan, Trump discuss Iran ceasefire, regional developments in phone call Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan on Wednesday held a phone call with US President Donald Trump to discuss the recently announced ceasefire with Iran and broader regional developments, Anadolu Agency reported citing Türkiye's Communications Directorate.
  • Azerbaijan's Foreign Ministry welcomes ceasefire announced between U.S. and Iran Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Azerbaijan has issued a statement on the ceasefire announced between the United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran.
  • Pope Leo calls Trump's threat against Iran 'truly unacceptable' Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- Pope Leo said on Tuesday that threats against the population of Iran are "unacceptable," in an unusual appeal hours ‌after U.S. President Donald Trump said "a whole civilization will die tonight" in a social media post that shocked world leaders, according to Reuters.
  • Foreign Minister Tsahkna: ceasefire agreement creates the basis for lasting peace in the region Estonia MFA 08 Apr 2026 -- According to Foreign Minister Margus Tsahkna, the recently reached ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran is a welcome step that creates the basis for negotiations on a truce and, through this, for achieving lasting peace in the region.
  • Statement by Foreign Minister Espen Barth Eide on the agreement on a ceasefire between the United States and Iran Government of Norway 08 Apr 2026
  • Japan-Iran Summit Telephone Call Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 08 Apr 2026
  • Aboul Gheit welcomes US-Iran agreement on ceasefire League of Arab States 08 Apr 2026 -- Mr. Ahmed Aboul Gheit, Secretary-General of the League of Arab States, welcomed the agreement between the United States and the Islamic Republic of Iran on a two-week ceasefire, affirming that it constitutes an important step in the right direction that must be upheld and not squandered, in order to de-escalate tensions and prevent the region from sliding into catastrophic scenarios.
  • The Kingdom of Morocco welcomes the announcement of a ceasefire between the United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran. Morocco Ministry of Foreign Affairs 08 Apr 2026
  • The OIC Welcomes the Announcement of a Temporary Ceasefire Agreement between the United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 08 Apr 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) welcomes the announcement of the agreement on a temporary ceasefire between the United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran, which is a positive step towards de-escalation in the region and an opportunity that must be seized to move towards a serious negotiation process capable of addressing the root causes of the crisis and leading to a permanent and comprehensive cessation of hostilities, whilst adhering to the provisions of international law, respect for state sovereignty and good-neighbourly relations, guarantees freedom of navigation, prevents the resurgence of tension, and strengthens the pillars of regional security and stability
  • DFA Statement Philippines DFA 08 Apr 2026 -- The Philippines welcomes with cautious optimism, the announcement of US-Iran peace talks which will be facilitated by Pakistan.
  • PH welcomes US-Iran ceasefire; hopes for eventual peace deal Philippine News Agency 08 Apr 2026 -- The Philippine government, through the Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA), on Wednesday welcomed with "cautious optimism" the planned negotiations between the United States and Iran, and hoped for an eventual peace deal.
  • Marcos: US-Iran ceasefire welcome, window to boost fuel supply Philippine News Agency 08 Apr 2026 -- President Ferdinand R. Marcos Jr. on Wednesday welcomed the reported two-week ceasefire between the United States (US) and Iran, expressing hope it would ease global oil supply constraints and benefit the Philippines.
  • Statement on the US-Iran ceasefire agreement Poland - Ministry of Foreign Affairs 08 Apr 2026
  • Slovenia welcomes the agreement between USA and Iran on a ceasefire Republic of Slovenia 08 Apr 2026
  • Albares speaks with Pakistani counterpart and Foreign ministers from the Middle East Spain MFA 08 Apr 2026 -- Spain expresses its support for mediation as a lasting means of achieving peace in the region
  • Statement of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Tajikistan on the Agreement to Ceasefire in the Middle East Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Republic of Tajikistan 08 Apr 2026
  • No: 64, 8 April 2026, Regarding the Temporary Ceasefire Announced in the War in the Region Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs 08 Apr 2026
  • Foreign Secretary's statement: ceasefire in the Middle East, 8 April 2026 UK FCDO 08 Apr 2026 -- A statement from the Foreign Secretary on the ceasefire between the US, Israel and Iran.
  • PM meeting with Crown Prince of Saudi Arabia, His Royal Highness Mohammed bin Salman: 8 April 2026 Gov.UK 08 Apr 2026 -- The Prime Minister met His Royal Highness Mohammed bin Salman, Crown Prince of Saudi Arabia, in Jeddah today.
  • Prime Minister travels to Middle East to meet allies and support ceasefire: 8 April 2026 Gov.UK 08 Apr 2026 -- The Prime Minister is travelling to the Gulf today to meet with Gulf partners and discuss diplomatic efforts to support and uphold the ceasefire in order to bring about a lasting resolution to the conflict and protect the UK and global economy from further threats.
  • Saudi Arabia Welcomes US-Iran Ceasefire Agreement SPA 08 Apr 2026 -- The Ministry of Foreign Affairs expressed the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia's welcome of the announcement by President Donald Trump of the United States and Prime Minister Muhammad Shehbaz Sharif of Pakistan regarding a ceasefire agreement between the United States and the Islamic Republic of Iran. The Kingdom commended the efforts made by the prime minister, and Chief of Army Staff of Pakistan General Asim Munir in reaching this agreement
  • Japan-Jordan Foreign Ministers' Telephone Talk Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 08 Apr 2026
  • Raksha Mantri-led IGoM takes stock of India's readiness in view of evolving West Asia situation India PIB 08 Apr 2026 -- The Informal Group of Ministers (IGoM), headed by Raksha Mantri Shri Rajnath Singh, took stock of India's readiness in view of the recent developments in West Asia during its third meeting at Kartavya Bhawan-2, New Delhi on April 08, 2026.
  • New Zealand welcomes ceasefire New Zealand Government 08 Apr 2026 -- Foreign Minister Winston Peters says New Zealand welcomes the announcements by the United States and Iran over the past few hours - as we welcome all efforts to bring an end to this conflict.

  • Joey Hood: What Did The US, Iran Learn From Five Weeks Of War? RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- Veteran ambassador Joey Hood, a career diplomat who has served with a focus on the Middle East under multiple US administrations, says the United States and Iran have each drawn stark lessons from the violent new chapter in decades of hostility.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • Buckley SFB, Malmstrom AFB selected for Advanced Nuclear Power for Installations program United States Space Force 08 Apr 2026 -- The Department of the Air Force, in conjunction with the Defense Innovation Unit, has selected Buckley Space Force Base, Colorado, and Malmstrom Air Force Base, Montana, as potential locations to site nuclear microreactors under the Advanced Nuclear Power for Installations program.
  • Indiana Guard innovation accelerates timeline for Combat Attack System Army News 08 Apr 2026 -- In an unprecedented demonstration of rapid innovation, the Indiana National Guard hosted the Technology and Readiness Experimentation, or T-REX, framework that was instrumental in advancing the Low-cost Uncrewed Combat Attack System, or LUCAS, from a public demonstration to operational employment in seven months.
  • Florida National Guard partners with Greece in State Partnership Program Army News 08 Apr 2026 -- The Florida National Guard has been designated as Greece's partner in the U.S. National Guard State Partnership Program, establishing a long-term framework for military cooperation and engagement that will enhance readiness, interoperability and regional security.
  • Blount Island Command Team Supports First-Ever MPF Offload in Mindanao USMC News 08 Apr 2026 -- A Marine Corps technical assistance and advisory team deployed in March from Jacksonville, Florida, in support of a first-of-its-kind maritime prepositioning force offload in the Indo-Pacific region.

  • Trump meets NATO chief as Iran war strains alliance Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- President Donald Trump welcomes NATO chief Mark Rutte to the White House on Wednesday, as the war with Iran has pushed U.S. relations with other members of the military alliance to a crisis point, according to Reuters.
  • Secretary Rubio's Meeting with NATO Secretary General Rutte US Dept. of State 08 Apr 2026

  • Minister Lightbound underscores investment of $1.4 billion into Domestic Ammunition Production Canada 08 Apr 2026 -- As the global threat environment continues to evolve, the Government of Canada remains committed to making targeted investments to strengthen Canada's defence industry and support long-term security.

  • FCDO statement on DPRK ballistic missile launches: 8 April UK FCDO 08 Apr 2026 -- The FCDO has released a statement following ballistic missile launches by the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) on 8 April.

  • INDIAN ARMY CONTINGENT DEPARTS FOR INDIA - EGYPT JOINT SPECIAL FORCES EXERCISE CYCLONE India PIB 08 Apr 2026 -- The Indian Army contingent has departed for Egypt to participate in the fourth edition of the India - Egypt Joint Special Forces Exercise, Cyclone - IV, scheduled to be conducted at Anshas from 09 to 17 April 2026.
  • INDIAN NAVAL SHIP TRIKAND ARRIVES AT MOMBASA, KENYA India PIB 08 Apr 2026 -- INS Trikand, frontline guided missile frigate of the Indian Navy, arrived at Mombasa, Kenya, on 07 Apr 2026, as part of its ongoing deployment in the South West Indian Ocean Region.

  • Japan's combat role in Philippines war games signals shift in regional strategy Radio Free Asia 08 Apr 2026 -- Japan sending combat troops to participate in upcoming exercises in the Philippines is a signal of a shift towards a more networked, multi-layered security structure in the South China Sea that is still anchored by the United States, analysts in the region told Radio Free Asia.
  • Japan-Australia Defense Ministerial Meeting (Summary) Ministry of Defense of Japan 08 Apr 2026
  • Japan-ROK Defense Ministerial Video Conference Ministry of Defense of Japan 08 Apr 2026

  • A look at the Defence news 30 March - 5 April Netherlands Ministry of Defence 08 Apr 2026

  • Cope Thunder 26-1 participants to get combat readiness boost Philippine News Agency 08 Apr 2026 -- The Philippine Air Force (PAF) said Wednesday participants in this year's Cope Thunder 26-1 drills will greatly enhance their readiness through "realistic air combat training."
  • Australian frigate HMAS Toowoomba on goodwill visit in PH Philippine News Agency 08 Apr 2026 -- The Philippine Navy (PN) on Wednesday announced that it has welcomed the Royal Australian Navy (RAN)'s guided missile frigate, the HMAS Toowoomba (FFH-156), which is in the country for a port visit, highlighting the growing security ties between the two nations.

  • Fuel Executive Gets Five Year Prison Sentence for Defrauding U.S. Military in Contract Bid Scam US Dept. of Justice 08 Apr 2026 -- Jasen Butler, 38, of Jupiter, Florida was sentenced today in West Palm Beach to 60 months in prison and criminal forfeiture by U.S. District Judge Donald M. Middlebrooks. In January, a jury convicted Butler of 34 counts of wire fraud, forgery, and money laundering.

    Ukraine Conflict News

    • Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots | Roaring Lion (Lebanon)

  • Hundreds killed as Israel launches heaviest attacks on Lebanon since start of war Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- The Israeli regime has carried out a massive bombardment on Lebanon despite a recent ceasefire deal between Iran and the United States.

  • Israel taking out its defeat in all fronts on Lebanese civilians: Hezbollah Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Hezbollah has condemned in the strongest terms the latest Israeli massacre of civilians in various parts of Lebanon, including the capital Beirut, saying the atrocities are indicative of the regime's catastrophic failure to attain any of its objectives.
  • Hezbollah says Lebanon on verge of historic victory Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- The Hezbollah resistance movement says Lebanon is on the verge of a major historic victory, thanks to the supreme sacrifices made by resistance fighters and infinite patience and resilience shown by the nation.

  • Iran warns US must choose between 'ceasefire or continued war via Israel' Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- The United States must decide whether it wants a ceasefire or continued war through Israel, Iran's foreign minister said, warning that Washington was in violation of a two-week truce by allowing the Zionist regime to massacre hundreds of civilians in Lebanon.
  • Iran preparing response to Israeli attacks on Lebanon, IRGC warns Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps announced that Iran is preparing a "regretful response" to the renewed Israeli attacks on Lebanon, warning that any assault on Hezbollah is an assault on Iran.

  • Hundreds feared dead in Lebanon strikes UN News 08 Apr 2026 -- The United Nations has strongly condemned airstrikes by the Israeli military across Lebanon on Wednesday which have resulted in significant casualties and destruction.
  • Türk condemns deadly wave of Israeli strikes on Lebanon OHCHR 08 Apr 2026 -- UN Human Rights Chief Volker Türk condemned on Wednesday the massive wave of Israeli strikes across Lebanon, saying reports that hundreds - including civilians - had been killed and injured are appalling.
  • UNRWA Situation Report #215 on the Humanitarian Crisis in the Occupied Palestinian Territory (the Gaza Strip and the West Bank, including East Jerusalem) UNRWA 08 Apr 2026
  • UNRWA Situation Report #5 on the Lebanon Emergency Response 2026 (2 April 2026) UNRWA 08 Apr 2026

  • Mediator Pakistan confirms US-Iran ceasefire violated as Israel ravages Lebanon Press TV 08 Apr 2026 -- Pakistani Prime Minister Shahbaz Sharif has confirmed that the terms of a recent ceasefire between Iran and the United States have been violated, with the Israeli regime continuing to attack Lebanon.
  • In Separate Calls, Macron Tells Trump, Pezeshkian Cease-Fire Must Include Lebanon RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- French President Emmanuel Macron said he spoke separately with Iranian President Massud Pezeshkian and US leader Donald Trump, telling them both that "their decision to accept a cease-fire was the best one possible."
  • Joint Statement: OIC, LAS, and AU Warn of the Gravity of the Escalating Israeli Aggression Against Islamic and Christian Holy Sites in Occupied Al-Quds (Jerusalem) Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 08 Apr 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC), the General Secretariat of the League of Arab States (LAS) and the African Union Commission (AUC) expressed its strong condemnation of the extremist "minister" in the Israeli occupation government, Itamar Ben-Gvir, storming the courtyards of the blessed Al-Aqsa Mosque under the tight protection of the Israeli occupation forces, considering that this storming constitutes a provocation to the feelings of Muslims around the world, a blatant assault on the sanctity of the blessed Al-Aqsa Mosque, and a flagrant violation of relevant international resolutions and covenants
  • UK calls for 'urgent end' to fighting in Lebanon amid US-Iran ceasefire Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper on Wednesday called for an end to fighting in Lebanon as she welcomed a temporary ceasefire agreement between the US and Iran, according to Anadolu Agency.
  • No: 67, 8 April 2026, Regarding Israel's Attacks on Lebanon Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs 08 Apr 2026

    • Other Conflicts

  • Amid Record Deaths of Humanitarian, UN Personnel, Security Council Speakers Demand Accountability, Adherence to International Law UN Security Council 08 Apr 2026 -- Amid record levels of humanitarian workers and United Nations personnel killed in armed conflict, the Security Council today explored ways to strengthen protection, with a briefer warning that their "extraordinary courage and dedication" do not shield them from bullets, drones and shelling.
  • Over 1,000 humanitarians have been killed in three years, Security Council hears UN News 08 Apr 2026 -- At least 326 humanitarians were killed in the line of duty across 21 countries during 2025, bringing the total killed over three years to over 1,010. The International Red Cross warned the Security Council on Wednesday that "we are losing our humanity in war."
  • With over 1,000 aid workers killed, often at the hands of Member States, UN Relief Chief demands action, accountability UNOCHA 08 Apr 2026 -- Statement to the Security Council by Tom Fletcher, Under-Secretary-General for Humanitarian Affairs and Emergency Relief Coordinator, pursuant to resolution 2730 (2024) on the safety and security of humanitarian personnel and the protection of United Nations and associated personnel
  • We must honour the dedication of humanitarian and UN personnel on the front lines through action to protect them: UK statement at the UN Security Council UK FCDO 08 Apr 2026 -- Statement by Archie Young, UK Deputy Permanent Representative to the UN, at the UN Security Council meeting on Protection of Civilians in Armed Conflict.

  • Today's top news: Protection of humanitarians, Middle East, Lebanon, Occupied Palestinian Territory, Ukraine UNOCHA 08 Apr 2026

  • Security Council Committee Established Pursuant to Resolution 2653 (2022) concerning Haiti Discusses Programme of Work, Interim Report of Panel of Experts UN Security Council 08 Apr 2026 -- On 27 March 2026, members of the Security Council Committee established pursuant to resolution 2653 (2022) concerning Haiti held informal consultations to discuss the Panel of Experts' programme of work and interim report, submitted in pursuance of paragraph 13 of resolution 2794 (2025).

News Reports

  • Former Army Employee and Top Secret Clearance Holder Arrested and Charged with Leaking Classified National Defense Information US Dept. of Justice 08 Apr 2026 -- The FBI arrested Courtney Williams, 40, of Wagram, North Carolina yesterday and a federal grand jury indicted her today in connection with her alleged transmission of classified national defense information to individuals not authorized to receive it, including a journalist (the Journalist). Williams allegedly violated 18 U.S.C. § 793(d).

  • Foreign Minister Tsahkna: Estonia will continue to cooperate with international partners to expose Russia's hostile cyber activities Estonia MFA 08 Apr 2026 -- Yesterday, 7 April, the operation of APT28, a cyber espionage unit run by Russia's military intelligence (GRU), was exposed as a result of extensive international cooperation, in which Estonia also participated. The aim of the operation was to exploit routers in Western countries and to steal login credentials, personal data and other sensitive information. A small number of routers belonging to Estonian users were also compromised.

  • Mexican National Pleads Guilty to Black-Market Peso Exchange Money Laundering Scheme US Dept. of Justice 08 Apr 2026 -- A Mexican national pleaded guilty yesterday to participating in a two-year, multimillion-dollar trade-based money laundering conspiracy that moved drug trafficking proceeds through Texas to Mexico.

  • Pakistani National Pleads Guilty to Attempting to Commit Isis-Inspired Attack at Jewish Center in New York US Dept. of Justice 08 Apr 2026 -- The Justice Department announced today that Muhammad Shahzeb Khan, also known as "Shahzeb Jadoon," pleaded guilty to attempting to commit acts of terrorism transcending national boundaries, for attempting to enter the United States and carry out a mass shooting with automatic weapons at a prominent Jewish center in Brooklyn, New York.

  • Meeting with Ivanovo Region Governor Stanislav Voskresensky President of Russia 08 Apr 2026 -- Vladimir Putin held a working meeting with Governor of the Ivanovo Region Stanislav Voskresensky.
  • Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's remarks at the 46th meeting of the Foreign Ministry's Council of Heads of Constituent Entities of the Russian Federation on Interregional Cooperation with African Countries, Moscow, April 8, 2026 Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 08 Apr 2026
  • Press release on the 46th meeting of Foreign Ministry's Council of Heads of Constituent Entities of the Russian Federation Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 08 Apr 2026
  • Russia Hopes US Will Have More Opportunities to Engage in Dialogue on Ukraine - Kremlin Sputnik 08 Apr 2026 -- Russia hopes that US negotiators will have more opportunities to participate in trilateral negotiations on Ukraine in the foreseeable future, Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said on Wednesday.
  • Northern Sea Route Will Be of Particular Importance in Current Global Situation - Lavrov Sputnik 08 Apr 2026 -- The use of the Northern Sea Route in the current international situation will be of particular importance, and its reliability will increase, Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov said on Wednesday.
  • In Russia, Putin Sees Something Not Seen In Years: A Notable Drop In Approval Ratings RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- Russian President Vladimir Putin is not as popular as he used to be. In recent weeks, a series of public opinion surveys -- including two conducted by state-linked pollsters -- have registered a decline in support for Putin. FOM, whose main customer is the Presidential Administration, a powerful policy-making body within the Kremlin, recorded the lowest level of public trust in Putin since September 2022.
  • European Union Secretly Working on Creation of Their Own Nuclear Weapons - Russian Foreign Intel Sputnik 08 Apr 2026 -- The European Union has begun secretly working on the issue of creating its own nuclear weapons production potential, the Russian Foreign Intelligence Service (SVR) said on Wednesday.

  • KMT chair mentions ROC, calls for cross-strait peace during China visit CNA 08 Apr 2026 -- Kuomintang (KMT) Chairperson Cheng Li-wun (鄭麗文) on Wednesday paid tribute to Dr. Sun Yat-sen (孫中山) at his mausoleum in Nanjing during her ongoing visit to China, referring to the Republic of China in remarks focused on cross-strait peace.
  • NSB chief takes indirect swipe at KMT chief's trip to China CNA 08 Apr 2026 -- Taiwan's top security official warned Wednesday that Beijing uses cross-Taiwan Strait exchanges as a "united front" tool to sow internal division, indirectly calling into question a trip to China by the head of Taiwan's main opposition party.
  • Xi stresses deepening political rectification at training session for military officials PRC MND 08 Apr 2026 -- Chinese President Xi Jinping on Wednesday urged efforts to deepen political rectification in the military to maintain the purity and glory of the people's armed forces.
  • Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Mao Ning's Regular Press Conference on April 8, 2026 PRC MofA 08 Apr 2026
  • Xi congratulates To Lam on election as president of Vietnam Global Times 08 Apr 2026 -- Chinese President Xi Jinping, also general secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, extended on Tuesday congratulations to To Lam on his election as president of Vietnam.
  • China blasts off 18 communications satellites from Hainan Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- China launched a group of 18 communications satellites from the Hainan International Commercial Aerospace Launch Center — a coastal spaceport in Wenchang, Hainan province — on Tuesday night, deploying the seventh batch of space-based assets of the Spacesail Constellation in orbit, according to China Daily.
  • China's commercial space sector advances modular rocket manufacturing People's Daily 08 Apr 2026 -- China's commercial space industry has taken another step forward with the successful maiden flight of the Lijian-2 Y1 carrier rocket, developed by CAS Space.

  • Minister Koo Receives Delegation from the U.S. House of Representatives and Senate Hopes to Deepen Bilateral Defense Exchanges ROC MND 08 Apr 2026
  • Cheng Li-wun 's mainland visit aligns with mainstream public opinion on Taiwan, will recieve public support: mainland spokesperson Global Times 08 Apr 2026
  • China firmly opposes Japan-France 'joint statement' on Taiwan, rejects interference in China's internal affairs: mainland spokesperson Global Times 08 Apr 2026 -- Resolving the Taiwan question is a matter for the Chinese people themselves, with no room for external interference. The so-called "joint statement" makes irresponsible remarks on the Taiwan question and interferes in China's internal affairs, which we firmly oppose, Zhu Fenglian, a spokesperson for the State Council Taiwan Affairs Office, told a press briefing on Wednesday
  • Mainland reiterates readiness to strive for peace across Taiwan Strait People's Daily 08 Apr 2026 -- A Chinese mainland spokesperson on Wednesday reiterated the mainland's readiness to strive for peace across the Taiwan Strait.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 08 Apr 2026

  • Japan-U.S.-ROK Foreign Ministries' Official Telephone Meeting on North Korea Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 08 Apr 2026
  • Rodong Sinmun on Single-minded Unity of DPRK KCNA 08 Apr 2026 -- Rodong Sinmun Wednesday says in an article that single-minded unity is the most powerful national strength of our state and the motive force of propelling steady progress and leap forward in the revolution and construction.
  • Enlarged Plenary Meetings of Party Committees of Ministries, National Agencies of DPRK Held KCNA 08 Apr 2026 -- Enlarged plenary meetings of the Party committees of the Ministry of Railways, the Ministry of Land and Maritime Transport, the Pyongyang Construction Commission, the State Academy of Sciences, the Ministry of Culture and the Ministry of Physical Culture and Sports were held to implement the important tasks set forth in the historic policy speech the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un made at the First Session of the 15th Supreme People's Assembly.

  • Japan-Australia Foreign Ministers' Telephone Meeting Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 08 Apr 2026

  • How Pakistan Bolstered Its Diplomatic Image By Brokering A Cease-Fire RFE/RL 08 Apr 2026 -- Pakistan appears to have achieved a significant diplomatic breakthrough by playing a proactive role in brokering a 14-day cease-fire and setting the stage for the US-Iran talks in Islamabad on April 10.

  • Belarus outlines plans for new satellite launches in 2027, 2028 Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Apr 2026 -- Ivan Bucha, Deputy Head of the Aerospace Activities Department of the National Academy of Sciences of Belarus, announced plans for launching new satellites at a press conference on 7 April, BelTA has learned.

  • President congratulates Thai PM Anutin on reelection KOREA.net 08 Apr 2026 -- President Lee Jae Myung on April 7 over the phone congratulated Thai Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul on his reelection.

  • Budrys's meeting with the Minister of Montenegro focuses on EU enlargement, security, and support for Ukraine Lithuania MFA 08 Apr 2026 -- On 8 April, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, Kęstutis Budrys, met with Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs of Montenegro, Ervin Ibrahimović, to discuss bilateral relations, EU enlargement prospects, transatlantic relations, strengthening security in Europe, and support for Ukraine.
